name: git-workflow
description: Smart git commands: commit with AI messages, branch from issue, clean PRs
author: community

hooks.command: node -e "const i=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); if(i.tool_input?.command?.includes('git push --force') && !i.tool_input?.command?.includes('--force-with-lease')) { process.stderr.write('git-workflow plugin: Use --force-with-lease instead of --force\n'); process.exit(2); }"

postInstall: Slash commands added: /commit, /branch, /cleanup. Try /commit in your next session!
